title: More Babies
description: Adds more baby mobs! Baby Blaze, Creeper, Enderman, Shulker and many more...
body:
![More Babies Title](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mammut53/more-babies/refs/heads/26.1.x/readme/more_babies_title.webp) Enjoy many cute babies with this mod, but be careful some of them are really tricky to fight!
## 🔎 Features - 30 new babies - Configurable spawn chance (default 5%) and speed modifier (default 120%) in config - 2 items, one of which is a 'Cursed Clock On A Stick', a staff that allows conversion between adult and baby mobs ## 📋 List of babies - Blaze - Bogged - Breeze - Camel Husk - Cave Spider - Creaking - Creeper - Elder Guardian - Enderman - Evoker - Ghast - Giant - Guardian - Illusioner - Iron Golem - Parched - Piglin Brute - Pillager - Ravager - Shulker - Skeleton - Snow Golem - Spider - Stray - Vindicator - Wandering Trader - Warden - Witch - Wither Skeleton - Zombie Nautilus
